FEATURE ENGINEERING & TRANSFORMATION CHECKS
```{r}
# ============================================================
# 7.1  Check if log transformations help Y1 and Y2
# ============================================================
par(mfrow = c(2, 2))
hist(df$HeatingLoad, breaks = 30, main = "Y1: Heating Load", col = "lightblue")
hist(log(df$HeatingLoad), breaks = 30, main = "log(Y1)", col = "lightgreen")
hist(df$CoolingLoad, breaks = 30, main = "Y2: Cooling Load", col = "lightblue")
hist(log(df$CoolingLoad), breaks = 30, main = "log(Y2)", col = "lightgreen")
par(mfrow = c(1, 1))
```




```{r}
# ============================================================
# 7.2  Box-Cox transformation recommendation
# ============================================================
bc_y1 <- MASS::boxcox(lm(HeatingLoad ~ ., data = df %>% select(RelCompactness:HeatingLoad)))
lambda_y1 <- bc_y1$x[which.max(bc_y1$y)]
cat("Optimal Box-Cox lambda for Y1:", lambda_y1, "\n")

bc_y2 <- MASS::boxcox(lm(CoolingLoad ~ ., data = df %>% select(RelCompactness:RoofArea,
                          OverallHeight:GlazingAreaDist, CoolingLoad)))
lambda_y2 <- bc_y2$x[which.max(bc_y2$y)]
cat("Optimal Box-Cox lambda for Y2:", lambda_y2, "\n")
```




```{r}
# ============================================================
# 7.3  Check for polynomial relationships
# ============================================================
ggplot(df, aes(x = RelCompactness, y = HeatingLoad)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", formula = y ~ x, color = "blue", se = FALSE) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", formula = y ~ poly(x, 2), color = "red", se = FALSE) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", color = "green", se = FALSE) +
  labs(title = "Linear (blue) vs Quadratic (red) vs LOESS (green)",
       subtitle = "RelCompactness → Heating Load") +
  theme_minimal()
```


```{r}
# ============================================================
# 7.4  Create derived features (for experimentation)
# ============================================================
df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    CompactnessXHeight   = RelCompactness * OverallHeight,
    WallToRoofRatio      = WallArea / RoofArea,
    GlazingXCompactness  = GlazingArea * RelCompactness,
    SurfToVol            = SurfaceArea / (WallArea + RoofArea)
  )
```
